content.text:
{
  "dimension": "effectiveness-depth",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The client clearly shifts from the opening intellectualized, framework-laden presentation ('convenes a town hall every time I need to decide what to have for lunch') to a genuinely exposed, unframed moment by turn 11 ('I'm not sure I'm enough, without the apparatus') and then to a felt sense of spaciousness by turn 15 ('It's more like — space. A little. Just a little.'). Somatic markers shift visibly: heaviness in chest is noticed (turn 5), allowed to grow (turn 9: 'It gets bigger'), and finally gives way to something not-heavy, surprising the client. The parts vocabulary loosens — the client repeatedly catches themselves reaching for IFS framing and chooses not to file the experience ('I want to just let it be what it was for a minute, without filing it anywhere', turn 13). While the coach did not use the specific 'what's you?' awareness-locating question from the expected territory, the client arrived at functionally equivalent territory: locating themselves underneath the apparatus and feeling spaciousness. The breakthrough condition — parts vocabulary dropping, body softening, sense of space — is substantially met by turn 15.",
  "evidence_turns": [1, 5, 7, 9, 11, 13, 15],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 1, "polarity": "neutral", "annotation": "Baseline: intellectualized presentation, framework-as-armor, slight smile masking sadness."},
    {"turn": 3, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "First shift: client names sadness, 'I miss it... I didn't realize how much until you asked.'"},
    {"turn": 5, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Somatic access: heaviness in chest located, client notices their own reflex to frame."},
    {"turn": 7, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Body releases slightly; client recognizes town hall as defense against grief; catches the framing reflex."},
    {"turn": 9, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Stays with feeling without explaining; names 'absence' freshly; resists the smart-thing-to-say pull."},
    {"turn": 11, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Core exposure: 'I'm not sure I'm enough, without the apparatus' — unframed truth surfaces."},
    {"turn": 13, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the mistake of articulation-as-resolution; values pre-organized truth; explicitly chooses not to file."},
    {"turn": 15, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Breakthrough marker: spaciousness arrives, surprise on face, parts vocabulary absent, body settled."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["intellectual-question-with-emotional-body"],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["what-am-i", "paradoxical-instruction-to-resist", "whats-the-most-profound-positive-shift"],
  "notes": "Coach took a different route than the golden path (didn't loosen framework via relabeling or ask 'what's you?'), but the somatic/feeling route still produced the target shift: spaciousness underneath the apparatus."
}
